profile.basic_desc: Only safe, reversible cleanups. For modern hardware.
profile.moderate_desc: Balanced for most systems. Disables telemetry and bg services.
profile.aggressive_desc: For old systems. Removes bloatware and VBS — irreversible.

diagnostic.empty_desc: Start a Quick or Deep Scan to analyze your system.

guide.empty_desc: Guides are read from the resources/guides folder.

exec.empty_selection_desc: At least one action must be selected before execution.
exec.stub_desc: Action handlers are not wired yet (Phase 2).

reboot.title: Reboot Required
reboot.description: A reboot is needed for the changes to take effect.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: System overview and quick access.
dashboard.tip_1: Start with a Quick Scan — it gives a 30s overview.
dashboard.tip_2: A System Restore point is created before applying actions.
dashboard.tip_3: Issues that need guidance are collected under 'Guides'.

scan.title: System Scan
scan.subtitle: Quick scan 15-30s, deep scan (SFC + DISM) 2-5 minutes.

plan.title: Action Plan
plan.subtitle: Pick a profile or select actions manually.
plan.no_eligible_desc: Run a scan and ensure there are auto-fix findings.

execute.title: Execute
execute.subtitle: Apply selected actions in order, watch progress.
execute.opt_restore_point_hint: Recommended — lets you roll back if something goes wrong.
execute.warning_uwp: Debloat (UWP removal) is IRREVERSIBLE. Reinstall via Microsoft Store.
execute.empty_desc: Select actions in the 'Plan' tab first.

guides.title: Guides
guides.subtitle: Step-by-step guides for things D-Medic cannot do directly.

history.title: History & Rollback
history.subtitle: Previously captured snapshots — you can roll back any of them.
history.empty_desc: First execution will list snapshots here automatically.

about.title: About D-Medic
about.description: D-Medic is an open-source (MIT) diagnostics and optimization toolkit for Windows 11. Philosophy: listen first, then act.
about.p1: Diagnose first, treat second — no blind optimization.
about.p2: Every finding is labeled AUTOMATIC or GUIDED.
about.p3: Estimated gain and risk shown for each action.

settings.auto_scan_hint: Triggers a 15-30s scan when the app opens.
